params.name: include-attributes
params.description: Comma-delimited list of attributes that results must have.

params.name: exclude-attributes
params.description: Comma-delimited list of attributes that results must not have.

params.name: attribute-operator
params.description: Whether the include/exclude attribute filter is `and` (all) or `or` (any).

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-delimited list of theatre ids to filter by.

params.name: name
params.description: Filter theatres whose name contains the specified text.

params.name: market
params.description: Filter theatres in the specified market.

params.name: state
params.description: Filter theatres in the specified state (required when `city` is given).

params.name: city
params.description: Filter theatres in the specified city (requires `state`).

params.name: brand
params.description: Filter theatres by brand abbreviation.

params.name: include
params.description: Set to `closed` to include closed theatres.

params.name: page-number
params.description: Page number to retrieve. Defaults to 1.

params.name: page-size
params.description: Results per page (max 100). Defaults to 10.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of active AMC theatres, optionally filtered by attributes, market, state/city, brand, or name.
